LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JULY-29-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR VACATING AND CORRECTING THE DISMISSAL OF WELDER SANTOS & WELDER'S AUTO BODY LLC AS DEFENDANTS; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION TO VACATE THE DISMISSAL OF WELDER SANTOS AND WELDER'S AUTO BODY LLC IS GRANTED. THE DISMISSAL REMAINS WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10. ORDER SUBMITTED. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Vacating And Correcting The Dismissal Of Welder Santos & Welder'S Auto Body Llc As Defendants; Declaration Of Thomas A. Goodwin, Esq. In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF INFINITY INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion For Vacating And Correcting The Dismissal Of Welder Santos & Welder's Auto Body LLC As Defendants.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion to vacate the dismissal of Welder Santos and Welder's Auto Body LLC is granted. The dismissal remains with prejudice as to defendant Does 1 through 10.

Order Submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
